name: Calad's house
description:
As you climb to the top you see why there was no door, orcs inhabit this flet!
The corpse of an elf lies half into a stew pot and anything of beauty in this
room has been destroyed.  A large mound of feces sits in one corner and several
dead animals in another.  In the corner you can see an old diary lying
forgotten.  This is not what catches your eye at first, however.  It's the huge
gaping hole in the middle of the floor.  It looks like a boil or some terrible
affliction in this magnificent tree's very center.  As you stare at it
fascinated, you notice a rope and wooden ladder leading down it, through the
living blood of the tree.
